title: Source discovery stub CLI (Phase 3 entry)
problem: Principal audit post-ticket-136 recommends product work after three docs/checkpoint tickets. source_discovery.discover_candidate_sources is a NotImplementedError stub and research run without fixture-mode returns not_implemented. Operators lack a machine-readable discover-sources CLI surface for Phase 3 planning.
acceptance_criteria: discover-sources CLI returns structured not_implemented JSON with Phase 3 hint (no network, no Ollama).
Unit test asserts JSON shape and exit code.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove discover-sources CLI and revert source_discovery stub changes.
